title: Smoky Savory Malaysian Tripe Stew
description: A hearty, earthy Malaysian tripe stew infused with smoky paprika and tropical aromatics, perfect for a cozy date night.

ingredients.name: Beef tripe
ingredients.notes: cleaned and sliced into bite‑size pieces

instructions: Rinse the tripe thoroughly under running water and cut into bite‑size pieces.
Heat coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add garlic, ginger, lemongrass, and crushed chilies; sauté until fragrant, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cook for 30 seconds.
Pour in the beef bone broth and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the tripe, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1½ hours until the tripe is tender.
Stir in the coconut milk and fish sauce, continue cooking uncovered for 20 minutes to slightly thicken the stew.
Add the tamarind paste, and adjust salt if desired. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Turn off the heat and stir in lime juice, tasting to balance the flavors.
Ladle the stew into bowls and garnish with fresh cilantro if desired (optional).
Serve hot with cauliflower rice or fresh lettuce leaves for a complete meal.
